worthSeeing.title: Darvaza Gas Crater:
worthSeeing.text: The Gates of Hell - a burning natural gas crater in the Karakum Desert, lit since 1971.

worthSeeing.title: Merv:
worthSeeing.text: Ancient Silk Road oasis city, once the largest city in the world, UNESCO-listed.

worthSeeing.title: Karakum Desert:
worthSeeing.text: The Black Sand Desert covers 70% of the country, home to wild camels and saxaul trees.
